Header.promptPurpose: Design a contact page header with a title (Contact Us), a subheading, and possibly an image or icon. The header should be simple and professional. Soft background with clear typography. It should be centered.

Contact Form.promptPurpose: Design a contact form section with fields: name, email, subject, message. Use a clean, well-spaced layout. Each field should have a label and input field. The submit button should be prominent. On the right side, display contact information (email, phone, address). Use a card-like container for the form. Add hover effects on inputs.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a simple footer with copyright notice and quick links. Soft background, dark text, minimal.
